description: an integer beyond 2^53-1 in a digest-bearing field -> structural failure (check 1). IMPL GUARD ahead of -00; flagged for an -01 clarification (large integers MUST be decimal strings).

findings.detail: integer outside the JS-safe range (+/-9007199254740991) at effect.amount; large integers MUST be exact decimal strings for cross-impl digest reproducibility (impl guard ahead of -00; see -01 flag)
